label: GitHub 热门新项目
description: 近 7 天内创建、按 Star 数排序的开源项目（含 README）

items.title: Robbyant/lingbot-video
items.description: Scaling Mixture-of-Experts Video Pretraining for Embodied Intelligence

items.title: vinhhien112/Three.js-Object-Sculptor-Codex-Plugin
items.description: Codex plugin that turns attached object images into code-only, animation-ready procedural Three.js models.

items.title: mereyabdenbekuly-ctrl/clodex-ide
items.description: Local-first, zero-trust agentic IDE for verifiable autonomous software development.

items.title: op7418/guizang-material-illustration
items.description: 归藏的材质插画 skill：生成带字解释图、图表美化和参考辅助配图。

items.title: xiaotianfotos/homerail
items.description: Voice-first local agent orchestration runtime for auditable DAG workflows.

items.title: gostonx/uninstally
items.description: A clean, native macOS uninstaller. Completely removes apps and every file they leave behind using smart bundle-identifier detection. SwiftUI + Finder extension.

items.title: Raymondhou0917/speak-human-tw
items.description: 「說人話」：繁體中文的去 AI 味改寫 skill。抓 38 種 AI 寫作痕跡，順手校正中國用語與半形標點，給 Claude Code / Codex / Cursor 用。

items.title: Nanako0129/pilotfish
items.description: Multi-model orchestration layer for Claude Code — the frontier model plans, cheaper models execute, verification guards quality. One-prompt install.

items.title: Doriandarko/texts-to-transformer
items.description: Train a tiny Transformer from scratch on your iMessage history, entirely on your Mac.

items.title: cosmtrek/mindwalk
items.description: A visualization tool that replays coding-agent sessions on a 3D map of your codebase.

items.title: yetone/kill-ai-slop
items.description: A field guide to the visual & copy tics of AI-generated products — and an Agent Skill that scans your project and strips them out. https://killaislop.com

items.title: WeZZard/jlens-qwen36
items.description: J-space / Jacobian-lens visualizer for Qwen3.6-27B (4-bit) on Apple Silicon, ported to Apple MLX

items.title: bkingfilm/lapian-notes
items.description: 拉片笔记:把电影变成 AI 辅助的拉片笔记 - 本地抽帧/剧情泳道时间轴/结构树/情绪曲线/段落深拆

items.title: AlayaLab/AlayaWorld
items.description: Full-stack open-source interactive long-horizon world model.
